text_raw: A mortal, here to present themselves as tributes to my ocean!
text_clean: A mortal, here to present themselves as tributes to my ocean!

text_raw: You too shall join the depths!
text_clean: You too shall join the depths!

text_raw: At last, you submit before the majesty of the sea!
text_clean: At last, you submit before the majesty of the sea!

text_raw: Come now, venture into the depths of the ocean!
text_clean: Come now, venture into the depths of the ocean!

text_raw: Is your mind too feeble to fathom the ocean's greatness?
text_clean: Is your mind too feeble to fathom the ocean's greatness?

text_raw: Splendid! The sea demands more offerings, and here you are.
text_clean: Splendid! The sea demands more offerings, and here you are.

text_raw: All who refuse to serve the god of the sea must perish.
text_clean: All who refuse to serve the god of the sea must perish.

text_raw: Reject the call of the waves, and the ocean will claim you.
text_clean: Reject the call of the waves, and the ocean will claim you.

text_raw: Death to all who refuse to serve the god of the sea!
text_clean: Death to all who refuse to serve the god of the sea!

text_raw: Feeble creature... let great waves consume you!
text_clean: Feeble creature... let great waves consume you!

text_raw: Behold the greatness of the sea!
text_clean: Behold the greatness of the sea!

text_raw: Count yourself blessed to be offered to the sea!
text_clean: Count yourself blessed to be offered to the sea!

text_raw: You are nothing but a grain of sand before the waves!
text_clean: You are nothing but a grain of sand before the waves!
